The '''PB-950 Patrol Boat''' was a patrol craft produced by [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] for three hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]] up until the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==History==
Seeing widespread use during the [[Old Republic era|Old Republic]] as a system defense and customs interdiction vessel, the series' sturdy design and reliability came to be a welcome addition to many system and sector fleets.<ref name="AJ9">[[Star Wars Adventure Journal 9|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 9]]</ref>

<nowiki> </nowiki>Despite seeing a last surge of popularity at the onset of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] before production was halted to make way for the larger and more powerful [[Imperial Customs Corvette|Light corvette]], there are still tens of thousands of patrol boats in operation rounding out [[Imperial Office of Customs/Legends|Imperial Customs]] forces and system defense forces throughout the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]],<ref name="P&P">''[[Pirates & Privateers]]''</ref> with the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellians]] employing these craft during the original [[Corellian Crisis]].

==Design==
[[File:PB-950_deckplan.png|thumb|left|''PB-950'' deck plans]]
A rugged and reliable ship, the clunky PB-950 was known for its ability to withstand considerable punishment due to its double hulled design.<ref name="SOF">''[[Suns of Fortune]]''</ref> In addition, despite the ship's age, its armament sported enough firepower to deal with [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], its stock ion cannons being used to immobilize ships before they could escape.<ref name="SOF" />

Due to these qualities, while the ship declined in dedicated military use, the ship remained popular with smugglers and pirates alike, who appreciated its robust design.<ref name="SOF" />

However, due to the ship's age, replacement parts were scarce and expensive.<ref name="AJ9" /> Many private owners, in order to counter prohibitive costs, elected to entirely replace damaged components with modern equivalents rather than attempt to procure original parts.<ref name="AJ9" /> As a result, ships such as the ''[[Lumrunner]]'' were often extensively upgraded and modified when compared to their stock Clone Wars era counterparts.<ref name="AJ9" />

==Known ships==
*[[Diligent (PB-950 patrol boat)|''Diligent'']]<ref name="SOF" />
